content: 你可以看到，/Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/.air.toml; /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/.env.example; /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/Dockerfile; /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/docker-compose.yml; /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/prometheus.yml; /Users/hangtiancheng/github/swifty.go/swifty_agent/README.md; 这些文件中存在中文，请全部翻译为专业的英文表述
